title: cyclodium trianae
intro: Cyclodium trianae, also known as Triana's maidenhair, is a species of fern in the family Dryopteridaceae. It is native to the tropical forests of Central and South America. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, and is believed to have various health benefits such as reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and alleviating digestive problems. Cyclodium trianae can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is also used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments.
